message:
feat(engine): add alien risk envelope to runtime decision scoring

Introduce AlienRiskEnvelope with tail VaR/CVaR, conformal p-value,
e-value, and regime-shift detection for expected-loss containment
decisions. Add AlienRiskAlertLevel enum (Nominal/Elevated/Critical),
floor-action gap recommendation, and runtime event emission for
alien_envelope_compiled, alien_floor_gap, and alien_risk_alert.
Extend RuntimeDecisionScore with alien_risk_envelope and
alien_floor_gap_steps fields. Include test for critical alert on
extreme conformal outlier.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
